title: claytonia macilenta
intro: Claytonia macilenta, also known as Miner's lettuce or Winter purslane, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Claytonia macilenta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or added to salads, making it a versatile ingredient for herbal remedies.
